export const SERVICES = [{
  id: 1,
  slug: 'general-checkup',
  title: 'General Checkup',
  icon: 'tooth',
  shortDesc: 'Comprehensive oral health exams for the whole family.',
  description: 'Our thorough dental exams include digital X-rays, gum health assessment, oral cancer screening, and a personalised treatment plan.',
  duration: '60 min',
  price: 'From $80'
}, {
  id: 2,
  slug: 'teeth-cleaning',
  title: 'Teeth Cleaning',
  icon: 'sparkles',
  shortDesc: 'Professional cleaning for a brighter, healthier smile.',
  description: 'Remove plaque, tartar, and stains with our professional hygiene service. Recommended every 6 months.',
  duration: '45 min',
  price: 'From $120'
}, {
  id: 3,
  slug: 'teeth-whitening',
  title: 'Teeth Whitening',
  icon: 'sun',
  shortDesc: 'Safe, effective whitening for a radiant smile.',
  description: 'In-office Zoom whitening or custom take-home trays — choose the option that fits your lifestyle.',
  duration: '90 min',
  price: 'From $350'
}, {
  id: 4,
  slug: 'dental-implants',
  title: 'Dental Implants',
  icon: 'shield',
  shortDesc: 'Permanent tooth replacement that looks and feels natural.',
  description: 'Titanium implants fused with your jawbone provide a stable, long-lasting foundation for crowns or bridges.',
  duration: 'Multi-visit',
  price: 'From $3,000'
}, {
  id: 5,
  slug: 'orthodontics',
  title: 'Orthodontics',
  icon: 'alignLeft',
  shortDesc: 'Braces and clear aligners for all ages.',
  description: 'Traditional metal braces, ceramic braces, and Invisalign clear aligners to give you the smile you deserve.',
  duration: '12–24 months',
  price: 'From $3,500'
}, {
  id: 6,
  slug: 'root-canal',
  title: 'Root Canal',
  icon: 'activity',
  shortDesc: 'Pain relief and tooth preservation in one visit.',
  description: 'Modern root canal therapy is comfortable and quick — save your tooth and eliminate infection.',
  duration: '90 min',
  price: 'From $700'
}, {
  id: 7,
  slug: 'cosmetic-dentistry',
  title: 'Cosmetic Dentistry',
  icon: 'star',
  shortDesc: 'Veneers, bonding, and smile makeovers.',
  description: 'Porcelain veneers, composite bonding, and full smile redesigns tailored to your facial aesthetics.',
  duration: 'Varies',
  price: 'From $500'
}, {
  id: 8,
  slug: 'pediatric-dentistry',
  title: 'Pediatric Dentistry',
  icon: 'heart',
  shortDesc: 'Gentle, friendly dental care for children.',
  description: 'We make first dental visits fun and stress-free, building healthy habits that last a lifetime.',
  duration: '45 min',
  price: 'From $60'
}];
export const TESTIMONIALS = [{
  _id: '1',
  name: 'Sarah M.',
  role: 'Patient for 4 years',
  rating: 5,
  text: "The doctor here is incredible. He made my root canal completely painless — I was shocked. I've been recommending Dant Vriksha to everyone I know."
}, {
  _id: '2',
  name: 'James T.',
  role: 'Invisalign patient',
  rating: 5,
  text: "I was nervous about getting Invisalign at 38, but the results have completely changed my confidence. The process was explained clearly every step of the way."
}, {
  _id: '3',
  name: 'Maya R.',
  role: 'New patient',
  rating: 5,
  text: "Brought my daughter in for her first check-up and she actually wants to go back! The kids area is so welcoming. Genuine five-star experience."
}, {
  _id: '4',
  name: 'David K.',
  role: 'Implant patient',
  rating: 5,
  text: "After losing a tooth in an accident I was devastated. The implant looks and feels exactly like my real tooth. Exceptional work and aftercare."

sourcesContent:
export const SERVICES = [
  { id: 1, slug: 'general-checkup', title: 'General Checkup', icon: 'tooth',
    shortDesc: 'Comprehensive oral health exams for the whole family.',
    description: 'Our thorough dental exams include digital X-rays, gum health assessment, oral cancer screening, and a personalised treatment plan.',
    duration: '60 min', price: 'From $80' },
  { id: 2, slug: 'teeth-cleaning', title: 'Teeth Cleaning', icon: 'sparkles',
    shortDesc: 'Professional cleaning for a brighter, healthier smile.',
    description: 'Remove plaque, tartar, and stains with our professional hygiene service. Recommended every 6 months.',
    duration: '45 min', price: 'From $120' },
  { id: 3, slug: 'teeth-whitening', title: 'Teeth Whitening', icon: 'sun',
    shortDesc: 'Safe, effective whitening for a radiant smile.',
    description: 'In-office Zoom whitening or custom take-home trays — choose the option that fits your lifestyle.',
    duration: '90 min', price: 'From $350' },
  { id: 4, slug: 'dental-implants', title: 'Dental Implants', icon: 'shield',
    shortDesc: 'Permanent tooth replacement that looks and feels natural.',
    description: 'Titanium implants fused with your jawbone provide a stable, long-lasting foundation for crowns or bridges.',
    duration: 'Multi-visit', price: 'From $3,000' },
  { id: 5, slug: 'orthodontics', title: 'Orthodontics', icon: 'alignLeft',
    shortDesc: 'Braces and clear aligners for all ages.',
    description: 'Traditional metal braces, ceramic braces, and Invisalign clear aligners to give you the smile you deserve.',
    duration: '12–24 months', price: 'From $3,500' },
  { id: 6, slug: 'root-canal', title: 'Root Canal', icon: 'activity',
    shortDesc: 'Pain relief and tooth preservation in one visit.',
    description: 'Modern root canal therapy is comfortable and quick — save your tooth and eliminate infection.',
    duration: '90 min', price: 'From $700' },
  { id: 7, slug: 'cosmetic-dentistry', title: 'Cosmetic Dentistry', icon: 'star',
    shortDesc: 'Veneers, bonding, and smile makeovers.',
    description: 'Porcelain veneers, composite bonding, and full smile redesigns tailored to your facial aesthetics.',
    duration: 'Varies', price: 'From $500' },
  { id: 8, slug: 'pediatric-dentistry', title: 'Pediatric Dentistry', icon: 'heart',
    shortDesc: 'Gentle, friendly dental care for children.',
    description: 'We make first dental visits fun and stress-free, building healthy habits that last a lifetime.',
    duration: '45 min', price: 'From $60' },
];

export const TESTIMONIALS = [
  { _id: '1', name: 'Sarah M.', role: 'Patient for 4 years', rating: 5,
    text: "The doctor here is incredible. He made my root canal completely painless — I was shocked. I've been recommending Dant Vriksha to everyone I know." },
  { _id: '2', name: 'James T.', role: 'Invisalign patient', rating: 5,
    text: "I was nervous about getting Invisalign at 38, but the results have completely changed my confidence. The process was explained clearly every step of the way." },
  { _id: '3', name: 'Maya R.', role: 'New patient', rating: 5,
    text: "Brought my daughter in for her first check-up and she actually wants to go back! The kids area is so welcoming. Genuine five-star experience." },
  { _id: '4', name: 'David K.', role: 'Implant patient', rating: 5,
    text: "After losing a tooth in an accident I was devastated. The implant looks and feels exactly like my real tooth. Exceptional work and aftercare." },
];
